verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If I could have One Desire Before my life is through Even in my darkest night My life would shine for You If I could stop the hands of time Or make a wish come true I would tell my heart to burn with fire For no one else but You This is my One Desire

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are my Saving Grace Anchor of my soul In a world that's turned upside down I want you to know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my Faithful Friend The One that i lean on You always understand With all that I am I'll give you the deepest devotion i know With all of my strength I won't let You go As i look to You above I will give You all my love
